tests.description: PLACEHOLDER: synthetic swapTokenWithFee calldata (1,000 USDC → WETH via 1inch v6 router, 0.1 ETH minimum output, empty routerData). The function selector (0x7f7663d4) and ABI encoding are real; the txHash is not. Replace with a real mainnet rawTx + txHash once the first live swap through FeeCollector V2 (0x47f24068932Ac49bcbeD3aD105af57C6ECDF7459) has been recorded.
